descs.desc:
If target has 6+ [Combustion], Clash Power +1
If target has 10+ [Combustion], Coin Power +1

If target has 6+ [Combustion], Clash Power +1
If target has 6+ [Combustion], Coin Power +1

If target has 6+ [Combustion], Clash Power +1
If target has 6+ [Combustion], Coin Power +1

1040701.name: Flame Spread
1040701.desc:
When this unit defeats an enemy with [Combustion], apply 4 [Combustion] to 1 random enemy with no [Combustion] or with the least [Combustion] Potency. (Once per turn)
- In Focused Encounters, to 1 random Part

1040711.name: Flame Spread
1040711.desc:
When this unit defeats an enemy with [Combustion], apply 4 [Combustion] to 2 random enemies with no [Combustion] or with the least [Combustion] Potency. (2 times per turn)
- In Focused Encounters, to 2 random Parts

1040721.name: Spread Flame
1040721.desc:
When 1 ally with the slowest Speed defeats an enemy with [Combustion], inflict 3 [Combustion] on 1 random enemy (Once per turn)
- In Focused Encounters, on 1 random Part

1040731.name: Spread Flame
1040731.desc:
When 1 ally with the slowest Speed defeats an enemy with [Combustion], inflict 3 [Combustion] on 2 random enemies (Once per turn)
- In Focused Encounters, on 2 random Parts
